title: Headers
excerpt: description: Access HTTP request and response headers. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. All HTTP request and response headers are available through the [Headers API ↗](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Headers). When a header name possesses multiple values, those values will be concatenated as a single, comma-delimited string value. This means that `Headers.get` will always return a string or a `null` value. This applies to all header names except for `Set-Cookie`, which requires `Headers.getAll`. This is documented below in [Differences](#differences).
